title: Fresh Italian Oat Porridge
description: A fresh, silky Italian oat porridge that's perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring oats without added sugar.
instructions: Rinse the rolled oats under cold water to remove any dust or debris.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rinsed oats with the water and salt. Stir gently but thoroughly to ensure all oats are coated evenly.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and let simmer for about 10 minutes.
Use a spoon or ladle to stir the porridge occasionally to prevent sticking and make sure it's smooth.
Once cooked to your desired consistency (preferably creamy but still slightly thick), remove from heat.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving. You can add fresh fruits like strawberries, blueberries, and mint leaves for extra freshness.
